# State machine: `global-call`

<!-- GENERATED by `cargo run -p xtask -- state-machine-docs` from the composed
     service registry (ADR-0016). Do not edit by hand; regenerate instead. -->

```mermaid
stateDiagram-v2
    Active
    Terminated
    Terminating
    Active --> Terminated : immediate teardown (no live legs)
    Active --> Terminating : BeginTermination (a leg BYE / failure / timer)
    Terminating --> Terminated : all legs resolved
    [*] --> Active : INVITE accepted (call setup)
```
